## Analyzers (3)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [EmergingThreats MalwareInfo v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/EmergingThreats)
Retrieve ET details and info related to a malware hash.

- **Author:** Davide Arcuri and Andrea Garavaglia, LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `file`, `hash`

#### [EmergingThreats IPInfo v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/EmergingThreats)
Retrieve ET reputation, related malware, and IDS requests for a given IP address.

- **Author:** Davide Arcuri and Andrea Garavaglia, LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `ip`

#### [EmergingThreats DomainInfo v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/EmergingThreats)
Retrieve ET reputation, related malware, and IDS requests for a given domain.

- **Author:** Davide Arcuri and Andrea Garavaglia, LDO-CERT
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`
